violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of prep cooler needs cleaned of food debris.--Nonfood contact surface Reach-in-freezer was not cleaned as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floor under prep area was not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact su was not cleaned as frequently as required. The storage shelves on the North wall of the walk in cooler need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The monitors in the kitchen and the shelf below the flat grill need to be cleaned. The fan guards for the walk in cooler cooling unit need to be cleaned.
